name: Vulture
description:
### Special Abilities
[{"name":"Keen Sight and Smell","desc":"The vulture has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight or smell."},{"name":"Pack Tactics","desc":"The vulture has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the vulture's allies is within 5 ft. of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated."}]

### Actions
[{"name":"Beak","desc":"Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 2 (1d4) piercing damage.","attack_bonus":2,"damage":[{"damage_type":"piercing","damage_dice":"1d4"}]}]
